title: Mellow Sweet Greek Milk Tiropita
description: A winey, pillowy, nostalgic Greek dish featuring sweetened condensed milk, bonito-shave, and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients in a tiropita form, this dessert is a unique twist on traditional Greek cuisine. It is made with a flaky crust and a sweet, creamy filling.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, bonito flakes, and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Add the beaten eggs to the butter mixture and whisk until smooth.
Unroll the phyllo dough and cut it into 4 equal pieces.
Place a piece of phyllo dough on a flat surface and brush with the butter mixture.
Spoon the sweetened condensed milk mixture onto one half of the phyllo dough.
Fold the other half of the phyllo dough over the filling to form a triangle.
Brush the top of the tiropita with the remaining butter mixture.
Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients.
Place the tiropitas on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes.
